detail.description: Danny Jansen doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins. Jake Burger scores. Ezequiel Duran to 3rd.

Danny Jansen singles on a fly ball to right fielder Colton Cowser. Andrew McCutchen to 3rd.
